subcodes.title: Words to a believer, spoken on 1913-01-02
subcodes.first_line: The fragrance of the rose leads man to the garden and faith and assurance are the fragrance of the rose which attract individual believing souls together.
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @degrees of faith; certitude, @unity; oneness of humanity, @symbolism, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
